pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Construct Inhibition Graph (Layer 8, k=20)
pilot_tasks.description: Construct local inhibition graph for GPT-2 Small layer 8. Compute decoder correlations G = W_dec^T W_dec. Keep top-20 neighbors per latent. Save graph structure.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Graph construction completes; 24K latents processed; top-20 neighbors extracted; mean edge weight computable

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: H6 Validation (Layer 8)
pilot_tasks.description: Validate graph edges against Chanin absorption pairs for 26 first-letter features at layer 8. Compute precision@20, recall@20, Fisher exact test vs. random baseline.

go_no_go.go: Precision@20 >= 0.10 with p < 0.001 -> proceed with full H6-H10
go_no_go.caution: Precision@20 = 0.05-0.10 -> proceed with diagnostic-only claims, drop H10

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: H7 Precision-Recall Asymmetry (Layer 8)
pilot_tasks.description: Compute total incoming inhibition per first-letter feature. Test correlation with recall (predicted negative) and precision (predicted none). Use existing probing data.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Recall vs. inhibition: r < -0.2; Precision vs. inhibition: |r| < 0.2, p > 0.05

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: H8 At-Risk Feature Prediction (Layer 8)
pilot_tasks.description: Compute graph statistics (total_inhibition, degree) per feature. Test correlation with absorption_rate. Compare top vs. bottom quartile.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: r(total_inhibition, absorption_rate) > 0.2; top quartile has >1.5x absorption vs. bottom

pilot_go_criteria.primary: H6: Precision@20 >= 0.10 (25x enrichment over chance) with Fisher p < 0.001
pilot_go_criteria.secondary: H7: Recall correlates negatively with inhibition (r < -0.2); precision shows no correlation
pilot_go_criteria.tertiary: H8: Total inhibition correlates with absorption rate (r > 0.2)

if_h6_strong.action: PROCEED with full plan (H6-H10 + optional cross-model)
if_h6_strong.rationale: Core theoretical claim validated. Graph edges predict absorption with strong enrichment.

if_h6_moderate.action: PROCEED with diagnostic-only claims. Drop H10 (homeostatic repair). Keep H7-H9.
if_h6_moderate.rationale: Weak but real signal. Diagnostic tool is still useful. Repair claims too strong.

if_h6_weak.action: PIVOT to cand_c (Feature Absorption as Optimal Compression: Trade-off Analysis)
if_h6_weak.rationale: Core claim fails. Structural correspondence does not hold empirically. Fall back to descriptive trade-off analysis.

risk_mitigation.graph_construction_fails: Check SAE loading and W_dec shape. Fallback: use W_enc^T W_enc if W_dec unavailable.
risk_mitigation.no_absorption_pairs_found: Use existing absorption data from prior iterations. If ground truth is empty, pilot cannot proceed.
risk_mitigation.memory_issues: Process latents in batches. Top-k extraction can be done per-batch and merged.
risk_mitigation.precision_too_low: Test multiple k values. If all k fail, apply pivot decision tree.
